## Package Checklist

- [ ] Tests updated for package behavior changes.
- [ ] `README.md` updated if public API changed.
- [ ] `docs/COMPATIBILITY.md` updated if support claims changed.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated.
- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `npm run pack:dry-run` reviewed.
- [ ] Device smoke test completed if rendering behavior changed.
